note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: SQL Server authentication or Windows/Integrated authentication; the principal needs BACKUP DATABASE / RESTORE permissions (db_backupoperator / sysadmin).
keyEndpoints: BACKUP DATABASE ... TO DISK = N'...' WITH INIT, CHECKSUM
RESTORE DATABASE ... FROM DISK = N'...' WITH MOVE, RECOVERY

expectedRequestShape.tsql: BACKUP DATABASE [LocalAIFactory] TO DISK = N'\\backup\\laf\\LocalAIFactory_FULL.bak' WITH INIT, CHECKSUM, COMPRESSION;

expectedSuccessResponseShape.message: BACKUP DATABASE successfully processed N pages in X seconds.
expectedSuccessResponseShape.verify: RESTORE VERIFYONLY: The backup set on file 1 is valid.

expectedFailureResponseShape.error: Msg 3201: Cannot open backup device ... Operating system error 5(Access is denied).  OR  Msg 3013 BACKUP DATABASE is terminating abnormally.
expectedFailureResponseShape.restoreError: Msg 3154: The backup set holds a backup of a database other than the existing database.

commonIntegrationFailure: OS error 5 (Access denied) when the SQL Server service account cannot write the backup share; RESTORE fails with Msg 3154 when overwriting a different database without WITH REPLACE.
preventionRule: Grant the SQL Server service account write access to the backup path; use WITH CHECKSUM + RESTORE VERIFYONLY; periodically test full restores on a recovery instance.
